title: 有馬記念の後に・All Eyez On Me

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: WOOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur won?! She actually did it?! I can't
believe she crushed the best of the best from two
whole generations!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Does that mean she's the star of the year?!
Th-that's wild!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
That was one amazing run... You're really
something else, Air Shakur...

text_block_list.name: Spectator D
text_block_list.text:
Geez, forget everyone else... My eyes were on Air
Shakur the whole time.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I see. So this is the world of your creation. Maybe
I should take back what I said about it being too
beautiful.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Shakur... I've never seen that look in her eyes
before.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I wonder what dwells within that fiery gaze of
hers... I...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Tachyon? Do you think it would've been better if
I hadn't come today?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't say. But your path has long since been
set into motion, whether or not you chose to
attend today.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: And now she has a hold on you. That's all.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...
Shakur...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Haha.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: That's right. Make some noise, yell your lungs out.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Burn the sight of me into your retinas. That's as
much as I'll let you do.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Air Shakur places her hand on her chest.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Were you watchin'? D'you hear that?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: You've lost.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And then...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur doesn't say anything to me, but just by
meeting her gaze...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I can instantly pick up her unspoken message.
